titles.title: Benton MacKaye National Scenic Trail Feasibility Study Act of 2026
Benton MacKaye National Scenic Trail Feasibility Study Act of 2025
Benton MacKaye National Scenic Trail Feasibility Study Act of 2026
To amend the National Trails System Act to direct the Secretary of Agriculture to conduct a study on the feasibility of designating the Benton MacKaye Trail as a national scenic trail.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by Unanimous Consent.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Natural Resources. H. Rept. 119-582.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 502.

committee.name: House Natural Resources
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
